creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I follow the steps of the official documentation of Espressif's ESP-IDF, i.e.

https://docs.espressif.com/projects/esp-idf/en/v5.3.1/esp32/api-guides/build-system.html

My understanding of the toolchain's build process is very limited. It seems there is a xtensa-toolchain-wrapper dealing with such stuff for esp32, esp32s2, esp32s3. But this is simply speculating, "peeping" on T. Sakurai's port provided at github and my own (limited) understanding. Taken the pkg-plist of that port, there is a dedicated toolchain for each esp32-type referenced. I have not checked whether the derivates are simply hardlinks to the "xtensa-esp-elf-XXX" binary, so it is just speculation.
